text.title: Product Development Trends Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: 2026Q2 trend brief for solo-creator SaaS
example.note: Candidates: on-device LLM inference, voice-first creation, AI-native CRM, AR/VR newsletter, sustainability badges. Sources: MLC paper (academic), Pieter Levels indie report (practitioner), Apple Intelligence adoption stat (market). Scores: on-device LLM (4/4/5/2) -> bet; voice-first (3/2/3/3) -> monitor; AR/VR (1/1/1/4) -> ignore. Kill criteria for on-device: 'MLC benchmarks regress >30% YoY or Apple/Microsoft kill local inference'. Verdict tables shipped.
